title: SGM Gravity Induction Drift RC Car with Steering Wheel & Pedal Control – 1/14 Scale Remote Control Racing Toy Car for Kids & Teens (Orange)
features: Realistic Steering Wheel & Pedal Control – Full steering wheel and pedal set gives kids a true driving experience, helping them build coordination and control while playing.
Durable, Shock‑Resistant Build – Made with high‑quality ABS plastic and flexible rubber tyres for better grip and durability; designed to resist shocks and bumps for safe, long‑lasting fun.
Exciting Speed & LED Lights – Powered by a high‑speed motor (approx. 8.2 km/h) with LED lights for fun during day or night — ideal for indoor and outdoor driving sessions.
Easy 2.4GHz Wireless Remote Control – Simple remote control with up to ~20 m range, powered by standard AA batteries (not included). Great for children and beginners.
Perfect Gift for Kids & Teens – Compact 1/14 scale design and attractive red/Orange colours make this RC car a fantastic gift for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions.
description: Product description Bring the thrill of real‑life racing home with the SGM Gravity Induction Drift RC Car — the ultimate remote control toy for kids and teens who love speed, control, and fun. This 1/14 scale car offers an immersive driving experience with its full steering wheel and pedal control system, giving young drivers a feel of real‑world driving. Constructed from sturdy ABS plastic and equipped with rubber tyres and a shock‑resistant build, this RC car is designed for durability and long-lasting play — even during rough handling or collisions. With its powerful motor (approx. 8.2 km/h) and bright LED lights, the SGM RC car delivers an exciting and realistic racing experience, whether inside the home or outdoors. The responsive 2.4 GHz wireless remote control (with approx. 20 m range) makes steering simple and fun — perfect for kids, beginners and casual users alike. Its compact size and lightweight build also make it easy to store, carry or gift. Whether you’re looking to improve spatial awareness and motor skills, or just want a fun and interactive toy, the SGM Gravity Induction Drift RC Car is a top pick. Add it to your cart and let the racing begin! Safety Warning No
